vBRIEFInfo.description: Scaffold vbrief/ lifecycle subdirectories during `run project` so the CLI path matches the skill-driven greenfield path.

plan.title: fix(cli): run project should create vbrief lifecycle subdirectories

narratives.Problem: `run project` creates vbrief/PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json but does not scaffold the 5 lifecycle subdirectories (proposed/, pending/, active/, completed/, cancelled/). skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md creates them correctly; the CLI cmd_project() only creates vbrief/ implicitly via _atomic_write.
narratives.Action: After _atomic_write in cmd_project(), iterate LIFECYCLE_FOLDERS and mkdir each with parents=True, exist_ok=True. Add tests verifying the 5 folders exist after `run project`. Surface LIFECYCLE_FOLDERS as a module-level constant kept in sync with scripts/vbrief_validate.py.
narratives.Test: tests/cli/test_upgrade_gate.py::TestProjectLifecycleSubdirs - asserts all 5 subfolders exist after cmd_project and that the constant matches the validator ordering.
narratives.Outcome: After `run project`, `task vbrief:validate` and `task scope:*` work immediately without manual folder creation.

items.title: Scaffold 5 lifecycle subdirs after _atomic_write in cmd_project
Add TestProjectLifecycleSubdirs tests (subdir presence + constant alignment)
